Bridge of Spies (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $72,313,754Details
International Box Office $90,184,584
Worldwide Box Office $162,498,338
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,813,692
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,470,053
Total $12,283,745
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The story of James Donovan, a Brooklyn lawyer who finds himself thrust into the center of the Cold War when the CIA sends him on the near-impossible task to negotiate the release of a captured American U-2 pilot.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,371,203 (21.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.70 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,811 opening theaters/2,873 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $102,527,267

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 16th, 2015 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: October 14th, 2015 (Wide) (Philippines)
October 15th, 2015 (Wide) (Central America)
October 15th, 2015 (Wide) (Chile)
October 15th, 2015 (Wide) (Bolivia)
October 15th, 2015 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: February 2nd, 2016 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violence and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2385, 8/4/2015)
Running Time: 141 minutes
Award nomination: 2016 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Geographical setting: Berlin, East / West Berlin
Plot point: C.I.A., Secret Agent
Social setting: Cold War
Subgenre: Political Thriller
Time period setting: 1960s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Fox 2000 Pictures, Reliance Entertainment, Participant Media, Afterworks Limited, Studio Babelsberg, Amblin Entertainment, Marc Platt Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, German, Russian
